label: 烘焙零件
description: 把一个零件子图按 shape_id 定位的终端形状烘焙成内容寻址的 OBJ mesh，暂存到 workspace library/blobs/，返回 filename(<sha>.obj) 供阶段2 用 g_mesh 引用组装。CSG/profile 子图链走 bakeGeometryShape；单 op composite(gear/part/architecture…) 走 bake；URDF 原生 primitive(box/cylinder/sphere)默认不烘并返回空 filename + note（阶段2 直接用 g_box 等）。
description-en: Bake one part subgraph (terminal shape located by shape_id) into a content-addressed OBJ mesh, staged into workspace library/blobs/, returning filename(<sha>.obj) so phase-2 can reference it via g_mesh. CSG/profile subgraph chains use bakeGeometryShape; single-op composites (gear/part/architecture…) use bake; native URDF primitives (box/cylinder/sphere) are not baked and return an empty filename + note (use g_box etc. directly in phase 2).

inputs.name: geometry
inputs.label: 几何
inputs.description: 该零件的独立子图（阶段1 单件建模产物）。
inputs.description-en: The standalone subgraph for this single part (phase-1 per-part modeling output).

inputs.name: shape_id
inputs.label: 形状 id
inputs.description: 要烘焙的终端形状 id（CSG 根 / composite 形状）。可接上游 g_* 的 id 输出，或填字面值；留空时回退到 geometry.focus（最近一条语句）。
inputs.description-en: Terminal shape id to bake (CSG root / composite shape). Wire from an upstream g_* id output or type a literal; empty falls back to geometry.focus (the latest statement).

outputs.name: filename
outputs.label: Mesh 文件名
outputs.description: 烘焙产物的内容寻址文件名 <sha>.obj；接 g_mesh.filename 即可在阶段2 引用。原生 primitive 不烘时为空字符串。
outputs.description-en: Content-addressed filename <sha>.obj of the baked mesh; wire into g_mesh.filename to reference it in phase 2. Empty string when a native primitive is not baked.

outputs.name: sha256
outputs.label: sha256
outputs.description: 烘焙 mesh 的 sha256 内容指纹。
outputs.description-en: sha256 content fingerprint of the baked mesh.

outputs.name: vertexCount
outputs.label: 顶点数
outputs.description: 烘焙 mesh 的顶点数。
outputs.description-en: Vertex count of the baked mesh.

outputs.name: triangleCount
outputs.label: 三角面数
outputs.description: 烘焙 mesh 的三角面数。
outputs.description-en: Triangle count of the baked mesh.

outputs.name: cacheHit
outputs.label: 缓存命中
outputs.description: 本次烘焙是否命中进程内缓存。
outputs.description-en: Whether this bake hit the in-process cache.

outputs.name: bbox_min
outputs.label: 包围盒最小角
outputs.description: 烘焙 mesh 的局部 AABB 最小角 [x,y,z]（米，相对 part 原点）。接 g_mesh.bbox_min，让阶段2 场景里的 mesh 可解 AABB、QC overlap 检测生效。原生 primitive / 空 mesh 时为空数组。
outputs.description-en: Local AABB min corner [x,y,z] (meters, relative to part origin) of the baked mesh. Wire into g_mesh.bbox_min so phase-2 scene meshes resolve an AABB and QC overlap detection works. Empty array for native primitives / empty meshes.

outputs.name: bbox_max
outputs.label: 包围盒最大角
outputs.description: 烘焙 mesh 的局部 AABB 最大角 [x,y,z]（米，相对 part 原点）。接 g_mesh.bbox_max。
outputs.description-en: Local AABB max corner [x,y,z] (meters, relative to part origin) of the baked mesh. Wire into g_mesh.bbox_max.

outputs.name: size
outputs.label: 尺寸
outputs.description: 烘焙 mesh 的三轴尺寸 [sx,sy,sz]（米）= bbox_max - bbox_min。用于摆位时按真实尺寸算落地 / 间距 / 朝向。
outputs.description-en: Baked mesh size [sx,sy,sz] (meters) = bbox_max - bbox_min. Use it to compute grounding / spacing / orientation from real dimensions during placement.

outputs.name: geometry
outputs.label: 几何
outputs.description: 透传输入 geometry，便于链式接线。
outputs.description-en: Pass-through of the input geometry for chaining.

outputs.name: note
outputs.label: 提示
outputs.description: 非错误说明（如原生 primitive 未烘、缓存命中等）。
outputs.description-en: Non-error note (e.g. native primitive skipped, cache hit).

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: 错误
outputs.description: 烘焙失败 / 缺 baker / shape_id 未找到时的错误说明。
outputs.description-en: Error message on bake failure / missing baker / shape_id not found.
